Premium Specialist Disability Accommodation — two purpose-built SDA homes at 127 Gladstone Street, minutes from Mudgee's heart, designed around your life, your independence, and your joy.

Who we are

We're here to create a
real home.

We're the owners and operators of this SDA property — a small, dedicated team who believe that people living with disability deserve the very best housing. Not just a compliant box, but a genuinely beautiful, joyful place to call home.

We've invested everything into getting this right — the layout, the finishes, the outdoor spaces, the technology, and the location. We want you, your family and your support team to feel excited about this home from the very first moment you see it.

127 Gladstone Street is built to the highest SDA standard (HPS) and approved for people with High Physical Support needs. Every detail — from the wide hallways to the assistive technology provisions — has been chosen with you in mind.

✓ Open to all eligible NDIS participants
What makes it special

Built differently,
for a reason.

♿

High Physical Support

Full HPS construction standard — ceiling hoists, reinforced walls, accessible bathrooms, and 1:20 ramp access. Designed to SDA guidelines with care.

🏠

OOA Bedroom

Each home includes a dedicated Overnight Onsite Assistance (OOA) bedroom for your support worker — separate, private, and right there when you need them.

🌿

Oversized Backyards

Far larger than the SDA minimum, with landscaped gardens, big skies and fresh air. Your own private outdoor sanctuary — rare for SDA in a country town.

🔥

Fire Sprinklers & Safety First

A full residential fire sprinkler system is installed throughout every room. Safety is paramount here — your peace of mind, and that of your family and support team, matters to us deeply.

✓ Full residential coverage
📡

Assistive Technology Ready

Smart home-ready infrastructure — pre-wired for environmental controls, automated doors, lighting systems and any assistive tech your life needs.

☀️

Light, Air & Views

Designed around natural light and ventilation. Open living areas, high ceilings and full-length glazing connect you to the outdoors and Mudgee's beautiful sky.

🛡️
Safety is paramount

Full fire sprinkler protection, in every room.

100%
Sprinkler Coverage
AS1670
Australian Standard
24/7
Passive Protection

Two homes, one exceptional site.

Both homes are single-storey*, purpose-built SDA residences designed to feel spacious, modern and genuinely liveable — not institutional.

Location

Right in the
heart of Mudgee.

127 Gladstone Street sits on one of Mudgee's well-connected residential streets — close to everything that matters, and surrounded by the kind of country town warmth you can't manufacture.

🌳

Blackman's Park — walking distance

Mudgee's beloved community park and oval is right on your doorstep — perfect for morning strolls, community events and open-air living.

🛒

Mudgee CBD — ~450 metres

Cafés, shops, medical services, restaurants and community facilities — all within easy reach on flat, accessible streets.

🏥

Healthcare & Support Services

Mudgee Base Hospital and multiple allied health providers are a short drive away. The town has a growing disability support sector.

🍷

Mudgee — a great place to live

A vibrant regional town with a warm community, stunning landscape, and genuine country character. Mudgee is a place people love to call home.

📍 127 Gladstone Street, Mudgee NSW 2850 — map loads when viewing online.

Why trust us

Good people, doing this properly.

We know that choosing an SDA home is one of the most significant decisions a person and their family will make. Here's our commitment to you.

🏗️

Fully SDA Registered

NDIS registered SDA dwelling, fully compliant with all SDA design standards and enrolled with the NDIA.

🤝

Lease All Providers

We work with best in class SDA Providers. Your SIL Provider is your choice and completely your own.

🔑

Long-Term Tenancies

We're building homes for people to live in long-term. Stability and security matter to us as much as they do to you.

💬

Open & Transparent

We'll answer every question honestly. If you want to talk through the home, the lease or anything at all — just reach out.

Get in touch

Interested in calling
this home?

Register your interest and we'll be in touch with more details, floor plans and availability updates. No pressure, no obligation — just a friendly conversation.

Download Property Brochure

Or call us directly · We welcome calls from tenants, families, support coordinators and SDA providers.
